question: Does Greece tax foreign pensions at 7 percent?
answer: Qualified yes. Greece applies a flat 7 percent on foreign-source income for foreign pensioners who transfer tax residence and meet the rules, for up to 15 years.
rule: Greece offers a flat 7 percent tax on all foreign-source income for qualifying foreign pensioners who transfer their tax residence; applicants must not have been Greek tax residents in five of the prior six years, and must renew annually; the regime lasts up to 15 years.
